name: DEV-MOCHI
stack: Node.js · Claude Code Status Line API · JSON config
brief: The project IS the beast. Feed it commits, not kibble.
vision: Status lines that act as shared consciousness for all agents, eliminating context drift across sessions, worktrees, and handoffs.
mission: Zero-dependency, project-aware status line renderer that reads context from a single .json source of truth.
pitch: Feed the project commits, not kibble — the status line IS the project beast.
moonshot: A status line that auto-evolves its own roadmap by analyzing git history and commit residue.
roadmap: Epoch 2: Cross-agent sync — symlinked config across worktrees
Epoch 3: npm distribution — one command install
low_hanging: Normalize flat configs so old schema doesn't break nested renderer
Remove legacy example configs — superseded by unified .devmochi.json
quick_wins: Status line shows MISSION and PITCH in terminal refresh cycle
Dual-schema test passing with both flat and nested configs
next_steps: Verify normalization logic handles all edge cases
Push purified README with full MP-1 spec
sit_rep: Core renderer functional. Dual-schema support landed. MP-1 10-field protocol integrated. Ready for npm publish.
moat: Zero-dependency Node stdlib. No API keys, no cloud, no build step. <5ms render. Nothing to supply-chain attack.
pre_mortem: Context leakage — parent project CLAUDE.md bleeds into dev-mochi identity
Dependency rot — adding npm deps destroys the zero-dependency moat
Hallucinated progress — tracker says done but no E2E test proves it

constraints.platform: Claude Code statusline API → any terminal
